DISCOVERY 612, APPEARANCES: PETER KEITH, ESQ. FOR INTERVENOR/MOVING PARTY, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. KAREN Z. BOVARNICK, ESQ. FOR INTERVENOR/MOVING PARTY, THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA. DALE J. GIALI, ESQ. FOR DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY, PICK YOUR PART AUTO WRECKING DBA THE CITY TOW. MATTER ARGUED. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT ADOPTED THE TENTATIVE RULING. PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSE TO DEMANDS FOR INSPECTION IS MOOT IN PART, GRANTED IN PART, AND DENIED IN PART. THE MOTION IS MOOT AS VERIFICATIONS HAVE BEEN PROVIDED. HOWEVER, THE VERIFICATIONS MUST BE SUPPLEMENTED TO CONFIRM THAT ALL RESPONSIVE DOCUMENTS HAVE BEEN PRODUCED. AS THE MOTION SEEKS TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES AS TO ALL COMPANY CARS, THE MOTION IS DENIED. AS THE MOTION SEEKS TO COMPEL RESPONSES WHICH INCLUDE CARS ASSIGNED TO MULTIPLE PERSONS AS WELL AS CARS ASSIGNED TO ONLY ONE PERSON, THE MOTION IS GRANTED. THE RESPONSES ARE PROPERLY LIMITED TO CARS OBTAINED THROUGH CITY TOW. THE MOTION IS GRANTED AS IT SEEKS AN ORDER OVERRULING OBJECTIONS AS TO RELEVANCE, EXCEPT AS LIMITED TO CARS OBTAINED FROM CITY TOW, AND AN ORDER OVERRULING OBJECTIONS AS OVERBROAD. AS TO ANY DOCUMENTS WITHHELD PURSUANT TO A CLAIM OF PRIVILEGE, THOSE DOCUMENTS MUST BE IDENTIFIED WITH PARTICULARITY. THE RESPONSES MUST BE FULL AND COMPLETE AT THE TIME THEY ARE MADE. RESERVATIONS OF THE RIGHT TO SUPPLEMENT THE RESPONSES ARE NOT PROPER AND ARE ORDERED STRICKEN. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
